data.body: Investigation (INTERMEDIATE, opus): Three-way name drift detected. (1) Installer hardcodes 'navapbc/digital-service-orchestra-nextjs-template' at scripts/create-dso-app.sh:273. (2) Story DD (caf7-e03d, archived) references 'dso-org/template-application-nextjs' as a planned DSO fork. (3) Template registry + onboarding SKILL reference upstream 'navapbc/template-application-nextjs.git' (exists). The installer's URL matches neither plan nor upstream; per 068c-1e8a, it 404s. ESCALATE: requires product decision — (A) create dso-org fork and point installer there, (B) align installer with existing registry (upstream), (C) create the repo matching installer's current string. No code-only fix resolves the drift without user input.
